subject: A small green-skinned creature with trailing head tendrils runs along a rain-swept canal wall in a dark urban setting, reaching toward a glowing lamp post
description: A compact green-skinned humanoid figure with thin limbs and several long trailing stalks or tendrils extending from the back of its head bounds dynamically along a stone canal ledge. It wears a belted jacket and trousers, and its body language is mid-sprint or mid-leap. Water rushes past at the base of the stone wall behind it. A tall glowing green street lamp stands in the upper left. The surrounding architecture is dense and dark — buildings and shadows hint at a city canal district. The mood is urgent and wet, with deep blue-green atmospheric lighting.
foreground: green-skinned creature running along a stone canal ledge
background: dark urban canal with stone buildings and a glowing lamp
emotion: urgent, fleet — running on the edge of control
